channel.title: Security on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Telegram Domain Suspension
item.description:
Introduction to Telegram’s Domain Suspension  

Telegram, a popular messaging app, faced a significant disruption when its shortlink domain (t.me) was suspended for a day. The suspension was caused by a “serverhold” block by the domain registrar, Domain ME. This block was likely due to the domain registrar’s efforts to comply with U.S. sanctions laws.

Background on the Suspension  

The t.me domain was suspended on the same day that the U.S. Treasury imposed sanctions on a VPN provider called First VPN. The Treasury’s sanctions listing for First VPN contained a link to the full web address of the VPN provider’s public group on Telegram using the shortened t.me domain. This suggests that the suspension may have been related to the sanctions imposed by the U.S. Treasury.

item.title: Apple Crime Blotter Analysis
item.description:
Introduction to Apple Crime Blotter  

The Apple Crime Blotter is an occasional series that examines Apple-related crime. In this series, published on Apple Insider, various cases of Apple-related crimes are discussed, including stolen iPads, fake AirPods, and other Apple products. In this article, we will delve into the details of a recent case where a woman was bitten after her iPad was stolen, dozens of iPads were stolen from an elementary school, and a man was arrested for selling fake AirPods to police.

item.title: Vermilion Cliffs Ventures Fund II
item.description:
Introduction to Vermilion Cliffs Ventures  

Vermilion Cliffs Ventures, a venture capital firm founded by solo GP Ashley Smith, has announced the close of its second fund, Fund II, with a total of $25 million in capital commitments. This new fund will focus on investing in early-stage startups in the AI, security, and infrastructure spaces. As a seasoned marketing expert with experience working at companies like Twilio, Facebook, GitHub, and GitLab, Ashley Smith brings a unique perspective to the venture capital industry.

item.title: Windows Linux Security Deadline
item.description:
Introduction to UEFI Infections  

The clock is ticking for Windows and Linux users to update their cryptographic keys that protect their systems against firmware-based UEFI infections. Beginning June 24, three certificates that cryptographically verify each piece of firmware and software that loads during system boot will expire. These Microsoft-signed certificates are the linchpins of Secure Boot, a Microsoft-designed chain of trust. Secure Boot checks the digital signatures of all firmware that loads during system startup to ensure it originates from a trusted provider, such as the manufacturer of the motherboard the system runs on.

item.title: NordVPN Sale: 75% Off + 3 Free Months
item.description:
NordVPN Coupons: 75% Off, Plus 3 Months Free in June 2026  

Stay safe online and save big with the latest NordVPN coupons and discounts. In this article, we’ll explore the exclusive deals available in June 2026, including up to 77% off 2-year plans and 3 free months.

What is NordVPN?  

Before diving into the discounts, let’s quickly recap what NordVPN is all about. NordVPN is a popular virtual private network (VPN) service that enables users to browse the internet securely and privately. With NordVPN, you can:
